    • precision

      protected int precision
      Decimal precision for monetary value display based on the main currency's standard precision (e.g., 2 for USD/EUR, 0 for JPY). Used by getter methods to provide appropriately rounded values for user interfaces and reports while maintaining calculation accuracy in the underlying fields.

    • securityPositionGroupSummaryList

      public List<SecurityPositionGroupSummary> securityPositionGroupSummaryList

  • Method Details

    • calcGrandTotal

      public void calcGrandTotal(SecurityPositionGroupSummary securityPositionGroupSummary)
      Add the group total to the grand total, it should be called for each group.
      Parameters:
      securityPositionGroupSummary - the group summary to aggregate into grand totals
